pkgmetadata.longdescription: .. --restructuredtext--.. image httpstravis-ci.orgubernostrumdjango-referrer-policy.svgbranchmaster target httpstravis-ci.orgubernostrumdjango-referrer-policydjango-referrer-policy provides a middleware class implementing theReferrer-Policy header httpswww.w3.orgTRreferrer-policy_ forDjango httpswww.djangoproject.com_-powered sites.Setting the Referrer-Policy header allows you to control what, ifany, information is sent in the HTTP Referer header when a userclicks a link on your site.Documentation is available onlinehttpsdjango-referrer-policy.readthedocs.io_.
